lamb-fillet-with-pistachio-lezzet.name: Lamb Fillet With Pistachio
instructions: 1. Shake lamb fillets with sunflower oil on the pan until pink in both sides.
2. Find hardal swab dust antepf on each side and galeta flour.
3. Place lamb fillets on the oven tray and cook 6-7 minutes in the oven 160 degree.
4. Peel and peel the beet and rub the fine chopstick and sunflower oil.
5. For sauce, mix the cake and yellowms with fine chopping, salt, pepper and olive oil.
6. Fried kere and beet index to service plate.
7. Place chopped fillets on vegetables.
8. Taste seasonal greens and spices and serve on cake and garlic sauce.

lamb-with-artichokes-and-yogurt-in-the-o.name: Lamb With Artichokes And Yogurt In The Oven
lamb-with-artichokes-and-yogurt-in-the-o.original_name: Αρνί µε αγκινάρες και γιαούρτι στο φούρνο

ingredients.item: 11⁄2 kg of lamb cut into ports, hand or thread
11⁄2 kg of lamb cut into ports, hand or thread

instructions: Wash the meat well to remove any bones from the tassel (the way to cut).
Place it in a large bowl, twist the lemon and spread the lamb with its juice.
Add half the olive oil from the total quantity of the recipe and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Mix very well so that the meat is eveninged, and transfer to a baking pan along with the liquids left in the bowl.
We sprinkle the lamb with some water.
Cover the baking pan with a lid or fol and place it on the low rack of the oven.
Bake in a preheated oven, in the resistors, at 200°C for about 1 hour and 45 minutes.
Clean the Tender artichokes from the outsider hard leads and heat them in salted building water for about 1-2 minutes. We drag them.
Uncover the baking pan and place between the artichokes whole or cut in half. Continue baking for 15’, brown and soften the lamb well.
In a bowl, beat the eggs with hand whisk.
Add the yogurt, the remaining olive oil, salt, pepper, herbs and fresh onions chopped.
Add a few tabletspoons of the liquids of the baking pan (from baking the lamb), to dilute the yogurt slightly.
Mix very well until we have a homogeneous yogurt cream.
Once the meat is cooked and golden, pour it with the yogurt cream.
Put the baking pan back in the oven, unexplained, and continue baking for about 20 minutes, until the surface is golden and light crust is formed.
Serve the food while it is warm.

lasagna-with-chicken-leek-and-cream-chee.name: Lasagna With Chicken, Leek And Cream Cheese
lasagna-with-chicken-leek-and-cream-chee.original_name: Λαζάνια µε κοτόπουλο, πράσο και κρέµα τυριού

ingredients.item: 500 g cooked chicken roast or bottled
500 g cooked chicken roast or bottled

instructions: In a pot heat the butter, melt over medium heat.
Add the finely chopped leaves and leave them for 7–8–1 to Wilt without color.
Add the flower and mix for 2–3'.
Slowly, Always Stirring, add the broth and let the cream bind.
Salt and pepper and sprinkle the nutmeg.
We're holding two cup of cream for the sequel.
Finely chop the cooked chicken and add it to the cream.
We great a small square fire resistant vessel.
Scrub the lasagne with your hands into pieces.
Lay 1/3 of the lasagnes in the vessel.
Spread 1/3 of the cream with the Chicken.
And a second layer of lasagne.
Spread 1/3 Chicken cream.
We sprinkle the rest of the lasagne.
Spread the rest of the Chicken cream.
Pour with the 2 cups of cream we kept and sprinkle with the cheese.
Cover the baking pan and baking for 30 minutes at 1803
Uncover and continue for 20 minutes the baking, brown the food.

leeks-in-vinaigrette-with-walnuts-and-ta.name: Leeks In Vinaigrette With Walnuts And Tarragon
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast walnuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop. Transfer to a small bowl and toss with oil; season with salt.
Trim root ends of leeks and 1" from the dark green tops. Cut leeks into ½"-thick rounds (the dark green parts won’t be rounds, but that’s okay). Rinse well.
Cook leeks in a large pot of boiling salted water until meltingly tender, 12–15 minutes. Transfer to a bowl of ice water to stop the cooking. Drain and pat dry.
Whisk garlic, vinegar, and Dijon and whole grain mustards in a small bowl; season vinaigrette with salt.
Arrange leeks on a platter; drizzle with vinaigrette and let sit at least 10 minutes (the longer, the better).
Just before serving, scatter walnut mixture over leeks and top with tarragon and lots of pepper.
Do Ahead: Leeks (without walnut mixture and tarragon) can be marinated 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before serving.

lemon-cheesecake-bars.name: Lemon Cheesecake Bars
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a 9x13-inch baking pan with parchment paper.
Unroll both pieces of crescent dough. Lay one piece on the bottom of the prepared pan. Set second piece aside.

Combine cream cheese and 1/2 cup white sugar in a bowl; beat with an electric mixer until smooth. Mix in lemon pie filling, lemon zest and juice, and vanilla extract. Pour over crescent dough in the baking pan and cover with the second piece of dough. Pour melted butter over top and sprinkle with remaining white sugar.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 25 minutes.
Remove from the oven and place on a wire rack until completely cool, about 30 minutes. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 3 hours, or overnight.
Dust with confectioners' sugar and cut into 24 bars.

lemon-curd-television-teleculinaria.name: Lemon Curd - Television
instructions: Finely pinch the lemon peels, put it in a casserole, add the lemon juice, sugar and eggs, take it to the fire and stir.
Add the butter and let cook, in low heat, stirring always, until you get a thick cream. Take it off and let it cool. If you want, serve sprinkled with granulated almond.

lemon-drop-cocktail.name: Lemon Drop Cocktail
instructions: Run lemon wedge around the rim of a cocktail glass to dampen, then dip in sugar to coat.
Combine vodka, lemon juice, lemon simple syrup, and orange-flavored liqueur in a cocktail shaker. Fill with ice, seal, and shake until shaker frosts over. Pour into a martini glass to serve.

lemon-lavender-cake.name: Lemon Lavender Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease a fluted tube pan (such as Bundt®) generously.
Measure 5 tablespoons milk into a microwave-safe bowl. Heat in the microwave until warmed through, 30 to 45 seconds. Add lavender buds. Let steep to release their flavor, 10 to 15 minutes.

Whisk white sugar and butter together in a large bowl until creamy. Whisk in eggs, 1 at a time, whisking well after each addition. Add 1/2 cup lemon juice and lemon zest; mix until well-blended. Stir milk and lavender buds into the batter.
Sift cake flour and baking powder together in a bowl. Slowly fold into the batter, stirring well to prevent lumps. Pour into the greased tube pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean, 45 to 55 minutes. Cool in the pan for 5 minutes. Invert onto a wire rack to cool completely, at least 30 minutes.
Whisk remaining 5 tablespoons milk, 1/4 cup lemon juice, and confectioners' sugar together in a small bowl to make glaze; drizzle over the cooled cake. Let stand until glaze is set, about 30 minutes.

lemon-lime-cookies-teleculinaria.name: Lemon-lime Cookies
instructions: Put the butter and the caramel in a pot and put it on the fire until it melts. Remove from the fire, add the sugar and egg and stir well with a spoon. Add the flour and yeast and then add the other ingredients.
Mold balls of the same size with the previous preparation, place on a tray and bring to the oven preheated at 150oC for about 12 minutes. Remove, let it cool, take it off the board and serve.

lemony-mint-tabbouleh.name: Lemony Mint Tabbouleh

ingredients.item: Chopped cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions: Bulgur can be found at natural foods stores and some supermarkets.

Place bulgur in a large bowl, add boiling water to cover and let stand 15 minutes; drain and place bulgur in a clean bowl. Add tomatoes and their juices, scallions, parsley, mint, cilantro, oil, lemon zest and juice; season with salt and pepper and toss to combine. Serve with  German-Style Chicken Schnitzel (click for recipe).
DO AHEAD: Tabbouleh can be made up to 2 days ahead.

linguine-with-crab-lemon-chile-and-mint.name: Linguine With Crab, Lemon, Chile, And Mint

ingredients.prep: red jalapeños, or red Thai chiles, seeded, sliced into thin rounds
divided, plus 2 teaspoons (packed) finely grated lemon zest, divided
shelled Dungeness crab, king crab, or jumbo lump crabmeat

instructions: Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking liquid.

Meanwhile, melt 1 Tbsp. butter with 1 Tbsp. olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add shallots and stir until just soft, 3–4 minutes. Add garlic and 1 chile and cook, stirring often, until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add 1/2 Tbsp. lemon juice and 3 Tbsp. pasta cooking liquid to shallot mixture; add a pinch of pepper. Stir until liquid is almost evaporated, about 1 minute.

Transfer pasta to skillet and add 1/2 cup reserved pasta cooking liquid. Increase heat to medium-high. Cook, tossing pasta or stirring with tongs, until liquid is almost evaporated and pasta becomes glossy, about 2 minutes. Add the remaining 3 Tbsp. butter, 1 Tbsp. oil, 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1 tsp. lemon zest, crab, half of mint, and more chile rounds, if desired.

Stir pasta until butter melts and pasta is well coated, adding more pasta cooking liquid if dry. Divide between bowls; top with remaining 1 tsp. lemon zest and mint. Sprinkle with more lemon juice if desired.

loaded-butternut-squash-cordon-bleu.name: Loaded Butternut Squash 'cordon Bleu

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.

Slowly and carefully cut butternut squash in half lengthwise, starting at the stem end. Scoop out seeds with a spoon. Slice off about 1/8 inch from the bottom of each half to ensure they lay flat while baking. Place onto the prepared baking sheet.

Roast in the center of the preheated oven until tender but not falling apart, 60 to 90 minutes. Remove from the oven and let sit until cool enough to handle. Increase the oven temperature to 246°C (245 degrees C).
Use a spoon to scoop squash flesh into a bowl, leaving about 1/2 inch attached to the skin so shells won't collapse and fall apart later.
Add egg, Dijon, salt, and pepper to squash; mix and mash with a spoon until smooth, or leave it a bit chunky if desired. Stir in green onions, ham, and diced Gruyère; mix until combined.
Scoop mixture back into squash shells, distributing as evenly as possible. Sprinkle grated Gruyère over top.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is browned, about 15 minutes.
Remove from the oven and transfer squash halves to a cutting board. Garnish with green onions, cut each half into four slices, and serve.

lombard-sausages-with-toasted-cornbread-.name: Lombard Sausages With Toasted Cornbread
lombard-sausages-with-toasted-cornbread-.original_name: Salsichas em lombardo com broa torrada
instructions: Get the leaves of low-backed cabbage, get them to scald in salty water, put them in a bowl with cold water and let them cool. Then drain them and wrap a sausage on each leaf in the form of a sucker.

Peel and wash the onions and garlic teeth and pinch them finely. Also finely pinch the naked tomato. Take a pot to the fire with the olive oil, add the onion and half the garlic and let it saute until the onion is golden. Then add the tomato, the broth, the laurel leaf and the salsa branch, season with salt and pepper and let cook, in mild heat, until it becomes soft.
Then add the wrapped sausages, add water until covered and let cook, in mild heat, until cooked and the sauce is fine. Lay the sausages wrapped with the sauce on a dish or saucer.

Remove the codea to the broa, cut the core into pieces, crush the chipper along with the other garlic, spread over it and take it to the oven preheated at 200oC until it is golden. Remove from the oven and serve with rice or mashed potatoes.

lucky-7.name: Lucky 7
instructions: Fill a glass with 1 cup ice. Pour in 7UP and vodka; stir gently.
Garnish the glass with a wedge of lemon and lime.
